query: DELETE wes FROM workflow_execution_steps wes INNER JOIN workflow_executions we ON wes.executionId = we.id WHERE we.accountId IN (SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE (LOWER(name) LIKE '%test%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%demo%') AND name != 'Apex Systems Test');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nUtjHxifDnrEvTS.bc571705cde8 --database KNXKWFANWEUxWWEfuwT2Hr --execute DELETE wes FROM workflow_execution_steps wes INNER JOIN workflow_executions we ON wes.executionId = we.id WHERE we.accountId IN (SELECT id FROM accounts WHERE (LOWER(name) LIKE '%test%' OR LOWER(name) LIKE '%demo%') AND name != 'Apex Systems Test');
